text.title: Function Calling Patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: Six recurring failure modes with symptom / root-cause / fix.

antipattern.description: 50-tool dump — every registered tool surfaced to every call.
antipattern.symptom: Model picks the wrong tool ~20% of the time; same-category tools confused.
antipattern.root-cause: "Easier to expose everything" + no routing layer.
antipattern.fix: Two-stage router (templates/tool-router.py): pick category → surface category subset (≤20 tools).

antipattern.description: No arg validation — LLM-supplied args go straight to the executor.
antipattern.symptom: Production calls execute with hallucinated fields, wrong types, invalid enums.
antipattern.root-cause: Trust the model; no schema gate at the boundary.
antipattern.fix: Validate against input_schema before execute(); return ValidationError as tool_result so the model can self-correct (rule r2).

antipattern.description: Sequential tool dispatch when the model emitted parallel calls.
antipattern.symptom: Per-turn latency 3-5x what it should be; user-visible slowness.
antipattern.root-cause: Loop wrote a naive for-loop over tool_use blocks.
antipattern.fix: ThreadPoolExecutor / asyncio.gather over the parallel block list (rule r4).

antipattern.description: Infinite loop on a broken tool that returns the same response.
antipattern.symptom: Single conversation burns 50+ API calls; cost spike.
antipattern.fix: max_turns=15 + cap-hit log + truncated-answer return (rule r3).

antipattern.description: Vendor mixing — single conversation sends Anthropic tool_use to OpenAI API.
antipattern.symptom: Opaque API errors; debugging takes hours.
antipattern.fix: One conversation = one vendor format; adapter translates per call site, not per message (rule r6).

antipattern.description: Schema-versionless tools — schema change deploys without bumping the version.
antipattern.symptom: Mid-deploy, half traffic uses old schema, half new; intermittent errors.
antipattern.root-cause: Schema treated as code, not as API.
antipattern.fix: Bump version on any schema change; pin caller to a version; deprecate old versions explicitly (rule r7).
